title: Legendary Creatures
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59cd90da873e4c036fd8dc9f237c58b767cd32fa.png) # [](https://www.youtube.com/@MinecraftLegendaryEdition/featured)

This mod was made initially for the Minecraft Legendary Edition modpack

[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/837157/description_74de46ab-c0ba-431b-8485-dfac44b1fe2c.png)](https://wabbanode.com/affiliate/legendary)

It adds new creatures to the world. Those creatures are supposed to be aggressive and make the game more challenging.

Current creatures added

## Scarecrow Agressive mob that can appear when breaking crops. ![scarecrow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb716cc5230c3e343636274a2d73fba7237de30a.png) ## Hound Agressive forest creature that will charge at you and immobilize you with its bite. ![hound](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c54f856a66b49fedced9f626e162c4857b1e2fba.gif) ## Desert Mojo Agressive creature that spawns in desert plants. ![desert mojo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a19b8bac289dac141fed6428dc7e865b9f750c3.gif) ## Forest Mojo Agressive creature that can appear when breaking flowers. ![forest mojo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a8d21a0eb6e28e178b5b52f36b5bf861a2de046.gif) ## Wisp Rare passive flying creature that flies in the sky and drops a sack full of XP on death. Variants exist in the Nether and the End and give much more XP (Overworld = 30 XP // Nether = 80 XP // End = 240 XP) ![overworld wisp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e84aa719cb2dab07141ba955db9ca713ad301dd0.gif)![nether wisp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2c4757c0b01ee2dcf1f6e9f72b1b558a08d1d6b.gif)![end wisp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e625a9aeb558458c19a8e71722d0d3109fb59f8.gif) ## Scorpion Agressive desert creature that deals poison damages and can have baby scorpions on its back. Its variant deals x2 damage // has x2 health // gives x2 XP & loot ![scorpion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59e2191d4c311738530687f828f68e9bb7c54ec7.gif)![fire scorpion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a90f54e6a31ee5985cf168ecd21a8a917814837e.gif) ## Corpse Eater Agressive mob that has a small chance of spawning after killing a mob ![corpse eater](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6ba25246ef7ad16f1c6c6803b9a48bf24314c7d.gif) ## Peacock Spider Small creature that spawn on the beach and in jungles. Its bite will give you convulsions. Variants has a small chance to appear, and will have double HP/Damage/XP/Loot for the green one, and X4 for the black one. Good luck. ![peacock spider 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5290c74757a3ee3b600a0250cfabe10caefcfe73.gif)![peacock spider 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50c1bce22461313e8fd0e0d21c8cb75899cb7003.gif)![peacock spider 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/268284ee71969e4f0b96224aa9671bc524c3c34b.gif) ## Bullfrog Large creature that lives in swamps. Its tongue will bring your near its deadly bite. Rare variants have a chance to spawn (20% for tier 2, 4% for tier 3). They have x2 & x4 damage/HP/XP/Loot ![bullfrog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae0176eb13f1d830defd855454a0aacbdb52fbeb.gif)![bullfrog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80b680730a4b585955a639eacb4373f7ae794edb.gif)![bullfrog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58e39ac17249627d50520bc965afd994c1563661.gif) ![ambient update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a60671021ccfa1db4430437d6762bad85303624c.png) New ambient critters have been added to your world. Their presence is meant to add variety to the fauna. ![insects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e79f7890c685e9a3248fe207a74a5b4bb7d3aa5.png) Frequently Asked Questions :__

 

Will the mod be ported to further versions ?

Not for now. The mod will stick to the version of the modpack it was made for.

Will the mod be ported to Fabric ?

Not for now, no.

Are you going to add new monsters ?

Yes.

Are you going to improve loot with unique items ?

Yes.

Can I disable some mobs ?

Mod is very configurable. Have fun.

Can I add the mod in my modpack ?

Yes.
